channel.title: Zeitschrift für Naturforschung B
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Zeitschrift für Naturforschung B

item.title: Polyphosphoric acid (PPA): a new, highly efficient catalyst for the synthesis of functionalized azepino phthalazine hybrids
item.description: Article by Katja Engel, Thomas Schleid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znb-2024-0034

item.title: State-dependent gas chromatography based on flexible and tunable porous coordination polymers

item.title: A novel samarium(III) orotate complex [NaSm(orotate)4(H2O)10]·3H2O – crystal structure and vibrational spectra
item.description: Article by Katja Engel, Thomas Schleid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znb-2024-0091

item.title: (NH4)4[SO4][CB11H12]2: a new double salt with carbaborate anions crystallizing in a monoclinic variant of the anti-K2NiF4-type structure
item.description: Article by Katja Engel, Thomas Schleid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znb-2024-0096

item.title: K[Hg(CN)2][H3CCOO]: a pseudo-double salt with mercury(II)-cyanide molecules imbedded into an ionic matrix of potassium acetate
item.description: Article by Katja Engel, Thomas Schleid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znb-2024-0106

item.title: An aminosilyl-functionalized zincocene

item.title: Revisiting Na[C(CN)3] – refinement of the crystal structure from X-ray powder diffraction data, the Raman and IR spectra
item.description: Article by Katja Engel, Thomas Schleid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znb-2024-0105

item.title: Corrigendum zu: Die Serie caesiumhaltiger Thioarsenate(V) der Lanthanoide vom Formeltyp Cs3 Ln[AsS4]2 mit Ln = La–Nd und Sm
item.description: Article by Katja Engel, Thomas Schleid DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znb-2024-0104
